stemHtml: Which statement correctly describes the relationship between EU Regulation No. 996/2010 and EU Regulation No. 376/2014 and their roles in aviation safety?

options.a: Both regulations aim to improve aviation safety; 996/2010 focuses on accident and incident investigations, while 376/2014 focuses on the reporting and management of safety-relevant information.
options.b: 996/2010 covers incidents and occurrences investigation; 376/2014 covers accident investigation.
options.c: 996/2010 aims to ensure safety information is collected, stored, protected, exchanged, disseminated and analysed; 376/2014 aims to ensure it is reported.
options.d: 996/2010 covers accidents involving aircraft under 5700 kg; 376/2014 covers accidents involving aircraft over 5700 kg.
